rag_rules: Insert generated AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes and implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture when inserting annex blocks
Use valid component type scopes for component type annexes and implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use AGREE logical operators such as `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and implication `=>`
AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports unless the requirement and AADL data representation provide a numeric scalar
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
